prompt: Build me a confirmation dialog in Next.js with shadcn/ui that opens when a user clicks a 'Delete Account' button. Inside the dialog, there should be a popover that shows additional info when the user hovers over a help icon. The dialog should have a title, description, and Cancel/Confirm buttons. The popover should explain what happens when you delete your account. Use proper accessibility patterns.
assertions: Uses shadcn/ui Dialog components (DialogTrigger, DialogContent, DialogHeader, DialogTitle, DialogDescription, DialogFooter)
Uses shadcn/ui Popover components (Popover, PopoverTrigger, PopoverContent)
Does NOT import directly from @base-ui/react for Dialog or Popover
Includes proper accessibility attributes or relies on shadcn's built-in a11y
Has Cancel and Confirm action buttons in the dialog
